description: EGOS Agent Registry — Core framework starts clean. Agent implementations live in leaf repos (egos-lab, 852, br-acc, etc.).

agents.name: Dependency Auditor
agents.description: Scans package.json files for version conflicts, misplaced dev deps, and unused dependencies
agents.evals: manual — run dry_run and verify output matches expected format

agents.name: Archaeology Digger
agents.description: Recursively traverses git history, agent registries, governance files, and handoff documents to reconstruct the complete evolution lineage of the EGOS ecosystem
agents.evals: manual — dry_run produces lineage report with >0 entries

agents.name: Chatbot Compliance Checker
agents.description: Scans a target repository for the required modules defined in CHATBOT_SSOT and reports missing chatbot capabilities
agents.evals: manual — dry_run on egos repo should show 0 missing capabilities

agents.name: Dead Code Detector
agents.description: Finds dead exports, orphan files, and empty stubs across any TypeScript codebase using regex-based analysis (no external deps)
agents.evals: manual — run on packages/shared and verify output lists dead exports

agents.name: Capability Drift Checker
agents.description: Scans any target repo against the EGOS kernel's shared capabilities, governance files, workflows, and security basics to detect missing adoptions
agents.evals: manual — dry_run on egos repo should produce clean or near-clean report

agents.name: Context Tracker
agents.description: Estimates remaining usable context window (CTX 0-280) from uncommitted files, session commits, handoff size, and agent runs. Emits zone emoji + /end recommendation when CTX > 180.
agents.evals: manual — run and verify CTX estimate is in 0-280 range with zone classification

agents.name: GTM Harvester
agents.description: Scans public GitHub repositories for GTM/market strategy artifacts and highlights reusable patterns plus named-entity gaps
agents.evals: manual — dry_run against a known repo should return >0 GTM patterns

agents.name: AIOX Gem Hunter
agents.description: Scans SynkraAI/aiox-core and local NotebookLM export artifacts to extract high-signal orchestration gems with keep/drop diagnosis for EGOS
agents.evals: manual — dry_run should produce gems list with keep/drop classification

agents.name: Framework Benchmarker
agents.description: Benchmarks MASA and competing agent/orchestration frameworks from official docs to produce keep/drop adoption guidance for EGOS
agents.evals: manual — dry_run should produce benchmark report with ≥2 frameworks compared

agents.name: Mastra Gem Hunter
agents.description: Scans mastra-ai/mastra for high-signal workflow/eval/observability/MCP patterns and emits keep/drop adoption guidance
agents.evals: manual — dry_run should return Mastra gem list with keep/drop for EGOS

agents.name: SSOT Auditor
agents.description: Structural Triage Engine — scans TypeScript/Python codebases via AST, detects type drift (duplicate definitions with different shapes), produces prioritized reports with codemod plans
agents.evals: manual — dry_run on packages/shared should detect 0 or known drift items

agents.name: SSOT Fixer
agents.description: Consumes ssot-auditor output and applies safe, low-risk codemod plans automatically (EXACT or RELAXED drift only)
agents.evals: manual — always run dry_run before execute; verify no unintended changes

agents.name: Stitch Intake Mapper
agents.description: Parses a returned .zip file from Google Stitch (or any UI generation tool), generates a file→destination mapping table, and creates TASKS.md integration tasks automatically
agents.evals: manual — dry_run with a sample .zip should produce mapping table with no errors

agents.name: Drift Sentinel
agents.description: 24/7 configuration drift detection — compares narrative (docs) vs live system state, monitors TASKS.md priorities vs git activity, agents.json vs agents/ directory
agents.evals: manual — dry_run should detect any staged drift and report it clearly
